title: Use Map.get/3 default instead of case-on-nil
prompt: Rewrite `def lang(settings) do case Map.get(settings, :language) do nil -> "en"; l -> l end end` using the 3-arity version of Map.get with a default value. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.I18n do ... end`.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes elixir-thinking: 'Use /3 variants (Keyword.get/3, Map.get/3) instead of case statements branching on nil.'
